/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/carbonqtapp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/carbonqtapp.dir/carbonqtapp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbonqtapp.dir/carbonqt_cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbonqtapp.dir/backend/src/SystemMonitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbonqtapp.dir/backend/src/ProcessTracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbonqtapp.dir/backend/src/EnergyEstimator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbonqtapp.dir/backend/src/ContextSwitchAnalyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbonqtapp.dir/backend/src/DataLogger.cpp.o -o carbonqtapp  /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2 libsqlite3.a
